# imobTech Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-11

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x (Web + Edge Functions), Dart 3.x (Flutter Mobile) + React 18+, React Router, TanStack Query, Zod, Tailwind CSS (Web); Flutter 3.x, Riverpod, GoRouter (Mobile); Supabase JS SDK v2 (ambos); Deno runtime (Edge Functions) (001-gestao-contratos-locacao)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (Web + Edge Functions), Dart 3.x (Flutter Mobile): Follow standard conventions
